title: Image provenance manifest (ADR-046, Milestone C)
description: Per-image attribution + license record for every asset under static/images/, static/textures/, static/logos/. Generated by scripts/build-image-provenance.ts and consumed by validate-data, the runtime data layer, and the /credits page (Milestone D).

schema_version.description: Bump this in lock-step with breaking changes to the entry shape.

commit_sha.description: Repo HEAD at generation time. May be null in dirty trees.

id.description: Stable hash-derived id for this image — independent of slot order. Lets the manifest survive renames in static/images/.

path.description: Emitted local path served by SvelteKit (relative to /, not the repo root).

title.description: Human-readable image title — typically the Commons file title or the NASA Images asset title.

author.description: Photographer / illustrator credit when known. Falls back to agency.

agency.description: Operating agency or publisher (NASA, ESA, JAXA, ISRO, CNSA, Roscosmos, MBRSC, CSA, SpaceX, Blue Origin, Solar System Scope, etc.).

source_url.description: Canonical original page (Commons file page, NASA detail URL, agency page, Solar System Scope page).

image_url.description: Resolved upstream image URL used for download, when known. Optional for backfill entries.

license_short.description: Short license id from scripts/license-allowlist.ts or a waived id.

license_url.description: Explicit license URL where applicable (CC URLs, NASA media usage page, etc.).

license_rationale.description: One-line justification for the license_short — e.g. "U.S. Government work — public domain" or "Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0 International".

modifications.description: Enumerated transforms applied: e.g. resized, reencoded-jpeg, cropped, downloaded-via-special-filepath.

nasa_id.description: NASA Images asset id when source_type === 'nasa-images-api'.
